This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] executeTool() aborts target signal when the invoker document (same-origin) navigates away
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: "signal not provided to execute()"
[FAIL] executeTool() aborts target signal when the invoker document (cross-origin) navigates away
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: "signal not provided to execute()"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
